extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz attacked with BERNAL Egan from distance on Collada Llomena, dropped him by 1:35 on Lagos de Covadonga, teammate KUSS Sepp sprinted to second.
tactical_patterns: BERNAL Egan attacked early on Collada Llomena but lacked firepower to sustain when ROGLIC Primoz matched, revealing comparative weakness.
KUSS Sepp conserved energy sitting on chasers while leader rode away, then outsprinted GC rivals for stage bonus seconds.
IKING Odd Christian descended aggressively after being distanced to limit losses, demonstrating jersey defense without climbing legs to match.
Jumbo-Visma allowed ROGLIC to follow BERNAL's long attack rather than pacing, trusting leader's ability to respond and counter-attack.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: attacked from distance with BERNAL, then distanced him by 90+ seconds on final climb showing overwhelming superiority
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: initiated early attack on Collada Llomena but faded badly on Lagos, losing 1:35 to ROGLIC reveals declining form
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: tactical maturity to sit in while leader attacked, then sprint past GC contenders LOPEZ and YATES for bonus seconds
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: neutral: chased well but lost sprint to KUSS and YATES, maintaining position without gaining ground on podium
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: fast finishing sprint nearly catching LOPEZ but no answer to ROGLIC's climbing acceleration earlier
rider_signals.IKING Odd Christian: positive: crashed early then descended aggressively to chase, fighting to limit GC losses despite losing red jersey
